title: Here’s When Amazon’s ROI Will Pull Ahead of Microsoft’s in the AI Cloud Spend War
excerpt: Microsoft is collecting AI paychecks right now while Amazon burns through billions building chips and power lines. Which strategy wins depends entirely on a...
content_html:
Alex Sirois

Mon, July 20, 2026 at 6:12 AM EDT 3 min read

Quick Read

  • Microsoft's AI run rate hit $37B with 20M paid Copilot seats, while Amazon burns $18B quarterly building silicon infrastructure toward a 2027 ROI crossover.

  • Jassy secured over $225B in Trainium commitments from Anthropic and OpenAI, pre-selling capacity that promises several hundred basis points of operating margin advantage at scale.

  • Amazon's $132B 2025 capex wave enters full revenue service in mid-2027, when owned Trainium silicon begins compounding against Microsoft's ongoing NVIDIA cost obligations.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Microsoft didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) both reported on April 29, 2026, revealing two different clocks running on AI cloud ROI. Microsoft is already cashing checks on Copilot and Azure. Amazon is pouring concrete, buying chips, and stringing power. The gap between them is the gap between a software business and an infrastructure project.

Copilot Is Paying Today. Trainium Is Paying Tomorrow.

Microsoft's Intelligent Cloud segment hit $34.68B, and Satya Nadella framed the payoff plainly: "Our AI business surpassed an annual revenue run rate of $37 billion, up 123% year-over-year." Paid Copilot seats reached over 20 million, with Accenture alone taking 740,000. That is SaaS revenue landing the same quarter the GPUs light up.

Amazon's picture is heavier. AWS grew 28% to $37.59B, its fastest pace in 15 quarters, and the Trainium chip business crossed a $20 billion run rate. But Q1 capex ran $44.2 billion against just $26.0 billion in operating cash flow, producing negative free cash flow of $18.2 billion. Andy Jassy did not flinch: "We have high confidence this will be monetized well, as we already have customer commitments for a substantial portion of it."

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Microsoft didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Business Driver

$627B

$364B

Operating Margin

45.6%

11.2%

Software Velocity vs. Silicon Ownership

Microsoft converts capex into revenue almost immediately because Copilot rides on existing seats. Gross margin sits at 68.8%, and the RPO backlog of $627B gives Amy Hood visibility other CFOs would trade a kidney for. Amazon's payoff is structural. Jassy told investors "Trainium will save us tens of billions of dollars of CapEx each year and provide several hundred basis points of operating margin advantage" at scale. With over $225 billion in Trainium commitments from Anthropic, OpenAI, and others, AWS is pre-selling the capacity it is building.

sentences.en: Microsoft converts capex into revenue almost immediately because Copilot rides on existing seats.
sentences.zh: 微软几乎立即将资本支出转化为收入，因为 Copilot 依赖于现有席位。

sentences.en: Gross margin sits at 68.8%, and the RPO backlog of $627B gives Amy Hood visibility other CFOs would trade a kidney for.
sentences.zh: 毛利率为 68.8%，RPO 积压金额为 627B，这让 Amy Hood 能够看到其他 CFO 愿意用肾脏来交换。
亚马逊的回报是结构性的。

sentences.en: With over $225 billion in Trainium commitments from Anthropic, OpenAI, and others, AWS is pre-selling the capacity it is building.
sentences.zh: AWS 正在预售其正在建设的容量，Anthropic、OpenAI 和其他公司承诺在 Trainium 上投入超过 2250 亿美元。

content_html_zh:
亚历克斯·西罗伊斯

2026 年 7 月 20 日星期一，美国东部时间上午 6:12 阅读 3 分钟

快速阅读

  • 微软的人工智能运行率达到 37B 美元，拥有 2000 万个付费副驾驶席位，而亚马逊每季度花费 18B 美元建设硅基础设施，以实现 2027 年的投资回报率交叉。
  • Jassy 从 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 获得了超过 225B 美元的 Trainium 承诺，预售能力承诺大规模运营利润优势数百个基点。
  • 亚马逊 132B 美元的 2025 年资本支出浪潮将于 2027 年中期进入全面收入服务，届时其拥有的 Trainium 芯片开始与微软持续承担的 NVIDIA 成本义务相抵触。
  • 立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而微软并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

微软（纳斯达克股票代码：MSFT）和亚马逊（纳斯达克股票代码：AMZN）均于 2026 年 4 月 29 日发布报告，揭示了在 AI 云投资回报率上运行的两种不同时钟。 微软已经在 Copilot 和 Azure 上兑现支票。 亚马逊正在浇筑混凝土、购买木片和拉线电源。 它们之间的差距就是软件业务和基础设施项目之间的差距。

副驾驶今天付款。 培训班明天就发薪了。

微软的智能云部门达到了 34.68B 美元，萨蒂亚·纳德拉 (Satya Nadella) 明确地描述了回报：“我们的人工智能业务的年收入运行率超过了 370 亿美元，同比增长 123%。” 付费副驾驶座位数已超过 2000 万个，仅埃森哲就占据了 74 万个座位。 这就是 SaaS 收入在 GPU 启动的同一季度下降。

亚马逊的图片比较重。 AWS 增长 28%，达到 37.59B 美元，这是 15 个季度以来最快的增速，Trainium 芯片业务的运行速度突破了 200 亿美元。 但第一季度资本支出为 442 亿美元，而运营现金流仅为 260 亿美元，产生 182 亿美元的负自由现金流。 安迪·贾西 (Andy Jassy) 毫不退缩：“我们非常有信心这将能够很好地货币化，因为我们已经向客户承诺了其中的很大一部分。”

立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而微软并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

商务司机微软亚马逊
人工智能运行率

$37B

$15B+ AI，$20B 芯片
2026 年资本支出计划

~$190B

~$200B

积压/恢复点目标

$627B

$364B

营业利润率

45.6%

11.2%

软件速度与芯片所有权

微软几乎立即将资本支出转化为收入，因为 Copilot 依赖于现有席位。 毛利率为 68.8%，RPO 积压金额为 627B，这让 Amy Hood 能够看到其他 CFO 愿意用肾脏来交换。 亚马逊的回报是结构性的。 Jassy 告诉投资者“Trainium 每年将为我们节省数百亿美元的资本支出，并大规模提供数百个基点的运营利润优势”。 AWS 正在预售其正在建设的容量，Anthropic、OpenAI 和其他公司承诺在 Trainium 上投入超过 2250 亿美元。
